data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified commit 26dfbd5b3d18 is on main, removes all prompt-guidance commands from scripts/install.sh (176 lines) and scripts/setup.sh (100 lines). No PROMPT_TEMPLATE_FILE, PROMPT_MARKER, or AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md mutation code remains. Both scripts pass bash -n syntax check. CI green on main (Changesets failure was obsolete workflow, removed in c49b91a0). No invariants defined. Commit tag already present. Untracked agent-metadata-normalization.md is unrelated.
